section_name: Relationship between speed limits and basic rule
chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text:
(1) The speed limits established by ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) do not authorize speeds higher than those required for compliance with the basic speed rule.

(2) The basic speed rule does not authorize speeds higher than those established as speed limits by ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) . [1987 c.887 §5; 2003 c.819 §8]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.108 — Relationship between speed limits and basic rule

(1) The speed limits established by ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) do not authorize speeds higher than those required for compliance with the basic speed rule.

(2) The basic speed rule does not authorize speeds higher than those established as speed limits by ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) . [1987 c.887 §5; 2003 c.819 §8]

subsections.text: The speed limits established by ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) do not authorize speeds higher than those required for compliance with the basic speed rule.
The basic speed rule does not authorize speeds higher than those established as speed limits by ORS 811.111 (Violating a speed limit) . [1987 c.887 §5; 2003 c.819 §8]
